name: GOLFTEC Greenville
address: 4100 Pelham Rd Suite C, Greenville, SC 29615
about: GOLFTEC is a golf training studio that focuses on personalized instruction using advanced technology and data-driven coaching. Their lessons are built on feedback from OPTIMOTION motion measurement technology and high-speed video analysis, which expert coaches use to identify swing issues and create improvement plans. The facilities also provide club fitting services using launch monitors to optimize equipment and offer practice memberships with access to training bays featuring launch monitors and video feedback for accelerated improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized coaching using data-driven analysis with OPTIMOTION technology
Club fitting that provides an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Practice memberships providing access to launch monitors and video feedback
Pro shop discount available at 10% off retail prices

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site kitchen or food service.
No mention of bar or alcohol service.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors are used for club fitting and practice to measure ball flight, club path, and impact data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs. However, GOLFTEC also provides club fitting services where you can be fitted for custom clubs that are available for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at GOLFTEC, and it is not specified if outside food or drinks are allowed. It is best to contact the location directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required for 18 holes at GOLFTEC is not specified. However, they offer on-course lessons to help apply swing improvements in real-world conditions, which would be separate from their indoor training sessions.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior golf lessons and mentions using technology to help juniors see and understand their progress, indicating they cater to a youth audience. However, specific details on a dedicated kid-friendly environment are not provided.
